title: Role and Responsibilities
text: The Employee is employed as {{job_title}} and shall perform such duties and responsibilities as are assigned by the Employer from time to time. The Employee shall report to such person as the Employer may designate and shall work at {{work_location}} or such other location as directed. The Employee shall devote full working time and attention to the Employer's business and shall not, without prior written consent, engage in any other employment or business activity during the term of employment.
name: Designation, Role and Reporting

legal_basis.note: Retrenchment — role definition affects workman status
Damages for breach of employment obligation

source: Industrial Disputes Act, 1947; Standing Orders Act, 1946
dispute_hotspots: Unilateral transfer — employee refuses transfer claiming it is constructive dismissal
Role modification — demotion disguised as role change
Conflict of interest — employee directs business to own company
